# CWE-343 vulnerable: Predictable Value Range from Previous Values (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-343-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
)

var doorPrizeState int = 11

func DrawDoorPrize(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	participant := r.URL.Query().Get("participant")
	if participant == "" {
		http.Error(w, "participant required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	doorPrizeState = (doorPrizeState*5 + 3) % 101
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	w.Header().Set("X-Participant", participant)
	fmt.Fprintf(w, "%d", doorPrizeState)
}
